nasb.text: But rumors from the East and from the North will disturb him, and he will go forth with great wrath to destroy and annihilate many.

esv.text: But news from the east and the north shall alarm him, and he shall go out with great fury to destroy and devote many to destruction.

cnv.text: 但從東方和北方必有消息傳來，使他驚惶，他就在烈怒之下出兵，要把許多人殺盡滅絕。

ccb.text: 但从东方和北方传来的消息必令他震惊，他必大怒，出兵杀戮、毁灭许多人。
